calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-14-2018 Continued To Jun-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ellahie Javed for Petitioner
Umair Latif (Petitioner's son) present in court

Ms. Javed stated that Mr. Latif is in court today to provide offer of proof regarding his address in Walnut Creek, that he does receive mail in SF at his mom's house with his two brothers, and he wants to continue receiving mail at SF address. The Court instructed Ms. Javed to file the verification pursuant to SFLR 14.18b. The Spousal Property Petition is continued to June 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
